result: The data cleaning and preprocessing script has successfully executed and produced the cleaned dataset. The final output file 'cleaned_data.csv' is now available in the 'data/output/' directory. This file contains the merged survey data with standardized sexual orientation variables (sori14, sori17, sori19, sori22, sori32) and a consolidated variable (sori_consolidated) that prioritizes the most recent valid response. All variables follow the specified naming conventions and missing value codes.
